payload.title: Migrate a local .scope/events log into a hosted tenant
payload.description: Re-runnable tool that reads .scope/events/*.json and POSTs them to the idempotent upload endpoint as one bulk union (no special-case path). Verify a migrated tenant's replayed board matches the user's local board exactly (reuse the golden-test harness). Depends on the upload endpoint. (From SCP-124.)
